ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinates of the region */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinates of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the region was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the region was last updated */,
  "depth" REAL /* Average depth of the region */,
  "water_temperature" REAL /* Average water temperature in the region */,
  "salinity" REAL /* Average salinity level in the region */,
  "oxygen_level" REAL /* Average dissolved oxygen level in the region */,
  "pH" REAL /* Average pH level of the water in the region */,
  "biomass" REAL /* Total biomass in the region */,
  "ecosystem_type" TEXT /* Type of ecosystem (e.g., coral reef, kelp forest, mangrove) */,
  "last_survey_date" TEXT /* Date of the last survey conducted in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product (e.g., corals, fish) */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of the product (e.g., coral, fish, algae) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the product was last updated */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the product */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Preferred habitat of the product */,
  "life_cycle" TEXT /* Life cycle of the product (e.g., annual, perennial) */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status (e.g., endangered, threatened, least concern) */,
  "last_assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the last assessment or study on the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the data was collected */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being monitored */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data collection */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data point */,
  "gapfilled" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the data point was gap-filled */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gap-filling method used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the data point was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the data point was last updated */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season during which the data was collected (e.g., spring, summer, fall, winter) */,
  "sampling_method" TEXT /* Method used for data collection (e.g., visual survey, remote sensing) */,
  "sampling_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the data point */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments related to the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the gap-filling method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the method */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the method was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the method was last updated */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used in the gap-filling method (e.g., linear regression, k-nearest neighbors) */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the gap-filling method */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the gap-filling method */,
  "last_used_date" TEXT /* Date when the method was last used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization the user is associated with */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data point */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data point was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access event was recorded */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user session */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
